matches.fragment: Notes API. Hexagonal layout: api/ (FastAPI routers, thin), domain/ (pure Python entities + services, no framework imports), ports/ (abstract repository interfaces in domain terms), adapters/ (Postgres implementations of the ports). Dependency direction points inward to the domain.

dependencies = ["fastapi", "pydantic", "asyncpg"]
# domain/ has zero third-party imports — verified by import-linter contract.
